message:
fix(storage): avoid fsqlite root-page collision in JSON list queries

The --json code path ran get_labels_for_issues and
count_relation_counts_for_issues with SQLITE_VAR_LIMIT=900, causing
MemDatabase ephemeral-table root pages to collide with real pager
pages when the second 900-row chunk was materialized via CTE VALUES.

Two changes:
- Reduce SQLITE_VAR_LIMIT from 900 to 200 in both functions
- Replace CTE-based UNION ALL query in count_relation_counts with
  two simple IN-clause queries, eliminating CTE materialization
  which was the primary collision trigger

Closes #227

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
